name: ddb-order-downloader
description: Process Deutsche Digitale Bibliothek newspaper orders into TXT, CSV, JSON, and ZIP deliverables.

interface.shortDescription: Download and package DDB newspaper OCR orders.
interface.longDescription: Process Deutsche Digitale Bibliothek newspaper search URLs and Xianyu-style customer requests into page-level OCR text, metadata CSV, snippets CSV, raw JSON, README, and ZIP deliverables while keeping Xianyu manual.
defaultPrompt: Process this DDB newspaper search URL into TXT/CSV/ZIP deliverables.
